title: Aureline public-proof packet
description: Boundary schema for one public-proof packet emitted by any of the seven scoreboard families registered in artifacts/qe/workflow_bundle_ids.yaml. Every packet pins one scoreboard_family_id, one packet_shape, one versioned workflow_bundle_id, one versioned archetype_row_ref, one exact_build_identity_ref, one docs/help version-match state, one freshness envelope, a closed task-script or success-criterion block, a known-limits-or-exclusions block, and a result-diff-versus-prior-claim-state block so narrowing, downgrade, and repeatability decisions can read one schema family rather than diverging per-lane dialects. Raw marketing copy, raw trace bodies, raw log bodies, and raw credential material never cross this boundary; the record carries opaque refs, typed vocabulary, UTC timestamps, and enumerated classes only. Adding a new scoreboard_family, packet_shape, result_class, publication_posture, docs_version_match_state, or known_limit_class is additive-minor and requires a schema-version bump; repurposing an existing value is breaking and requires a new decision row. The normative narrative lives in docs/qe/public_proof_scoreboards.md.

public_proof_packet_schema_version.description: Integer schema version for the public-proof packet. Bumped on breaking payload changes; additive-optional fields do not bump this version.

record_kind.description: Frozen discriminator. Every record carries record_kind = public_proof_packet_record so consumers that multiplex several packet families on one parser can route by field.

opaque_id.description: Opaque, stable id. Used for packet_id, fixture_owner_ref, evidence_owner_ref, prior_claim_state_ref, task_script_ref, and other upstream handles. No raw URLs, raw file paths outside the repo, raw logs, or raw credential material appear in this field.

monotonic_timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp produced from a monotonic clock source.

measured_date.description: YYYY-MM-DD date the packet was captured.

scoreboard_family_id.description: Scoreboard family the packet is emitted through. Mirrors scoreboard_family_vocabulary in artifacts/qe/workflow_bundle_ids.yaml verbatim.

packet_shape.description: Packet shape this record emits. Each shape pairs 1:1 with a scoreboard_family_id; the allOf gate below enforces the pairing.

support_class.description: Support class quoted verbatim from artifacts/compat/archetype_rubric.yaml.

packet_state.description: Packet lifecycle state. Only publishable packets MAY be cited by publishable claim rows; every other state is narrower.

publication_posture.description: Publication posture. Only packet_shape = benchmark_public_proof_packet MAY carry public_head_to_head_comparison; every other shape MUST NOT.

docs_version_match_state.description: Docs / help / service-health version-match state for this packet, quoted verbatim from docs/benchmarks/benchmark_publication_pack_template.md.

result_class.description: Closed result class. Mirrors scoreboard_result_class_vocabulary in artifacts/qe/workflow_bundle_ids.yaml verbatim.

downgrade_trigger.description: Downgrade-trigger vocabulary re-exported from artifacts/qe/workflow_bundle_ids.yaml and from the assurance-claim matrix.

known_limit_class.description: Closed vocabulary for the known-limits / exclusions block. Rows citing no_limits_declared MUST also carry an empty known_limit_notes list.

proof_class.description: Proof class the packet resolves against, quoted verbatim from evidence_freshness_slos.yaml.

iso_duration.description: ISO-8601 duration string, e.g. P14D, used for stale_after ceilings.

archetype_revision.description: Archetype revision this packet was measured against.

archetype_ref.description: Versioned archetype reference. Mirrors workflow_bundles[].archetype_row_refs in artifacts/qe/workflow_bundle_ids.yaml.

bundle_revision.description: Workflow-bundle revision this packet was measured against.

workspace_version.description: Rendered workspace.package version string copied from the exact-build identity.

hardware_definition_ref.description: Opaque hardware-definition pin. Required for benchmark_public_proof_packet; admissible as null for packet shapes that are hardware-independent.

environment_definition_ref.description: Opaque benchmark-environment pin. Required for benchmark_public_proof_packet; admissible as null for packet shapes that are environment-independent.

deployment_profile_ids.description: Deployment-profile ids this packet applies to, quoted verbatim from artifacts/governance/deployment_profiles.yaml.

environment_ref.description: Environment / build-identity envelope. The packet keys repeatability off exact_build_identity_ref, not off free-text version labels.

task_script_kind.description: Closed task-script kind. Benchmark and task / run / test / debug packets typically use quoted_command_line or named_workflow_scenario; docs and support packets typically use declarative_success_criterion.

task_summary_ref.description: Opaque ref to the human-readable task summary (command line, task step list, or success criterion). Free-form bytes never cross this boundary.

success_criterion_ref.description: Opaque ref to the success criterion when the task is not script-reproducible.

corpus_refs.description: Corpus ids from fixtures/benchmarks/corpus_manifest.yaml this packet exercised.

reference_workspace_refs.description: Reference-workspace ids from fixtures/workspaces/reference/ this packet exercised.

protected_path_refs.description: Protected-path ids from artifacts/perf/protected_path_ledger.yaml this packet cites when the claim is path-level.

task_script_block.description: Task script / success-criterion block. Every packet MUST declare exactly one script-or-criterion even when the scoreboard family is docs-copy-only; the criterion can be declarative.

prior_claim_state_class.description: Closed diff class against the prior published claim state. widened_vs_prior_claim MUST NOT appear on a packet in state narrowed, retest_pending, quarantined, or withdrawn.

prior_claim_state_ref.description: Opaque ref to the prior claim-state packet this row diffs against. Required on every class except first_emission_no_prior_claim.

diff_summary_ref.description: Opaque ref to a structured diff summary (bundle_revision delta, archetype_revision delta, support_class delta, docs_version_match delta, result_class delta). Free-form bytes never cross this boundary.

result_class_delta.description: Typed result_class delta against the prior packet. Null on first emission.

support_class_delta.description: Typed support_class delta against the prior packet. Null on first emission.

prior_claim_diff_block.description: Result diff versus prior claim state. Packets carry this so narrowing / downgrade / repeatability decisions can be audited without re-reading every prior packet body.

known_limit_summary_ref.description: Opaque ref to the known-limits or caveat note (typically a row in docs known-limits pages or an exclusion note in the benchmark-publication pack).

exclusion_refs.description: Explicit exclusion ids this packet inherits from the bound cutline's exclusion_refs list.

known_limit_note.description: One known-limit / exclusion entry. Packets MAY carry zero entries only when known_limits_and_exclusions.declared_class = no_limits_declared.

notes.description: Ordered list of typed known-limit notes. A packet with declared_class = no_limits_declared MUST carry an empty list; every other class MUST carry at least one note.

known_limits_and_exclusions.description: Known-limits / exclusions block. Every caveat that would otherwise end up in oral explanation belongs here.

pack_revision_ref.description: Opaque docs-pack revision pin. Required on every state except not_applicable.

caveat_or_repair_hook_ref.description: Opaque ref to the caveat or repair hook when state is compatible_minor_drift, incompatible_drift_detected, or pre_release_unverified.

docs_help_version_match.description: Docs/help version-match envelope. Packets that would otherwise misalign docs truth with the measured claim MUST switch to stale / limited / mismatch state rather than projecting the claim.

stale_after.description: ISO-8601 duration after which the packet expires. Null only when cadence_class = each_change and the proof class explicitly admits null.

rerun_trigger_refs.description: Ordered list of trigger ids from artifacts/governance/evidence_rerun_triggers.yaml. Every packet names at least one trigger so a mismatch expires the packet immediately even while stale_after remains in window.

expires_on.description: Absolute expiry timestamp derived from captured_at + stale_after. Convenience field; consumers MAY recompute from the other two fields.

freshness_envelope.description: Freshness envelope. Evaluators read this block alone to decide whether the packet is current.

competitor_product_ref.description: Opaque ref to the competitor product / version identity. Raw product names or license keys never cross this boundary; the ref resolves to a governed row.

task_parity_note_ref.description: Opaque ref to the task-parity note (how parity was enforced, or why the comparison is intentionally narrow).

competitor_settings_block.description: Competitor-settings block. Only packets with publication_posture = public_head_to_head_comparison MAY carry this; every other posture MUST NOT.

proof_surfaces.description: Ordered list of surfaces the packet projects through. Every surface MUST appear in the scoreboard family's admissible_proof_surfaces list in artifacts/qe/workflow_bundle_ids.yaml.

publication_envelope.description: Publication envelope. Packets declare which surfaces MAY render them and whether a competitor comparison is in scope.

packet_id.description: Stable packet id. Quoted verbatim by claim rows and release-evidence packets that cite this proof.

cutline_ref.description: Cutline row this packet qualifies. Quoted verbatim from artifacts/product/replacement_grade_cutlines.yaml.

persona_ref.description: Persona row this packet qualifies. Quoted verbatim from artifacts/product/p0_persona_rows.yaml.

active_downgrade_reasons.description: Downgrade triggers currently active on this packet. MUST be empty when result_class = pass_full_proof; MUST be non-empty when result_class is narrow_claim_before_publish, retest_pending, fail_claim_blocked, or quarantined.

fixture_owner_ref.description: Owner DRI for the fixture or archetype this packet exercised. Resolves through artifacts/governance/ownership_matrix.yaml.

evidence_owner_ref.description: Owner DRI for the evidence body the packet was captured from. Distinct from owner_ref when the evidence originates in a different lane than the publishing owner.

owner_ref.description: Primary owner DRI for this packet row.

superseded_by_packet_ref.description: Successor packet id when this record is superseded. Required when packet_state = superseded.

notes.description: Optional one-sentence reviewer note. Free-form prose bodies live outside this boundary.

allOf.description: Scoreboard family and packet shape MUST pair.
Only benchmark_public_proof_packet MAY carry publication_posture = public_head_to_head_comparison; every other shape MUST NOT.
public_head_to_head_comparison MUST carry a competitor_settings block; every other posture MUST NOT.
pass_full_proof forbids active downgrade reasons; narrow_claim_before_publish / retest_pending / fail_claim_blocked / quarantined require at least one.
Packets in state superseded MUST cite a successor packet id.
known_limits_and_exclusions.declared_class = no_limits_declared MUST carry an empty notes list; every other class MUST carry at least one note.
docs_help_version_match = not_applicable forbids a pack_revision_ref; every other state requires one.
prior_claim_diff.prior_claim_state_class = first_emission_no_prior_claim MUST carry null prior_claim_state_ref; every other class MUST carry a non-null ref.
benchmark_public_proof_packet MUST carry non-null hardware_definition_ref and environment_definition_ref; other packet shapes MAY carry null.

public_proof_packet_record.description: One public-proof packet record. The packet is the single source of truth for one (scoreboard_family_id, workflow_bundle_ref, archetype_row_ref, exact_build_identity_ref) tuple.
